plan_name: Cavan County Development Plan (incorporating Local Area Plan for Cavan Town) 2022-2028
plan_status: adopted 30 May 2022, in effect from 11 July 2022
dm_standards_chapter: Chapter 13 - Development Management (parking standards in Chapter 7 Table 7.4; rural siting/sightlines in Chapter 12)
portal: cavancoco.ie file library (PDF only; consult.cavancoco.ie is consultation portal but plan is published as PDF)
fetch_method: curl raw PDF (49MB) + pdftotext local text extraction (no per-chapter HTML available)
notes: Density, separation, private open space, building height, EV, waste storage extracted from Chapter 13; full car+bicycle parking standards from Chapter 7 Table 7.4; flood/AA/EIA triggers extracted. GAPS: sightline x/y visibility distances are in a separate Appendix 4 document (not in written statement PDF) - not captured. Cavan sets NO fixed numeric rural one-off-house minimum site area, plot ratio or site coverage figure (performance-based per NPF NPO 13) - recorded honestly.
